item.title: About
item.description:
I’m an AI Engineer specializing in Deep Learning and automation. Currently at CogniSync, building AI infrastructure for legal document processing — RAG systems, document parsing, and LLM-powered workflows. Previously co-founded Pythia Sociodynamical Technologies, where I architected ML pipelines, distributed scrapers, and SaaS platforms for financial compliance.

Feel free to reach out to chat about AI, tech, or potential collaborations.

item.title: Quickly generate RGB codes
item.description:
I needed to quickly generate a bunch of RGB hex codes. I also needed them to be available in the clipboard.

The best solution that I could find was to use pastel.

The magic command is the following.

pastel random -n 1 | pastel format | xclip -sel clip

Now put on a keybind, with something like i3 and you have a handy code at the stroke of a few buttons.
